prompt: Two references are attached: a PHOTO of the actual dish, and a vintage voucher whose food illustration shows the ENGRAVING STYLE to use. Draw the dish from the photo as a hand-tinted chromolithograph spot illustration in that engraving style, in NATURAL true-to-life colors: plump beef and cilantro dumplings with pleated wrappers in ivory-cream steamed dough, arranged in a round bamboo steamer in warm natural wood tones, wisps of pale steam, small fresh green cilantro accents. The illustration sits on a clean PLAIN WHITE background with nothing else. IMPORTANT: no yellow or gold color cast anywhere in the illustration - the colors must look correct and natural as if printed on white paper. No border, no frame, no text, no background color, no shadow. Subject fills about 70% of the frame. Warm ochre-sepia engraved linework with natural hand-tinted color washes. Flat traditional print illustration, no photorealism.
